turns.text: I'm trying to enable EMI for my Plus plan, but it's not working. The EMI amount is too high.

I apologize for the inconvenience. Can you please confirm if you've checked your payment and transaction history to see if there's any outstanding payment that might be causing the EMI to be calculated incorrectly?
No, my payment is all up to date. But this is the first month I'm trying to enable EMI.
I've processed a request to manually recalculate your EMI. You should receive an updated invoice within the next 24 hours.
Your EMI has been recalculated and the new amount has been applied. Your next invoice will reflect the updated EMI cost.

resolution: Your EMI has been successfully recalculated and the new amount has been applied to your account.

turns.text: I was charged double my EMI for the Pro plan this month. Can I get a refund?
I apologize for the error. I've initiated the process to reverse the double EMI charge, which should be back in your account within 5 business days.
Will I still be charged the normal EMI amount this month?
Yes, you will be charged the standard EMI amount for this month, as per your Pro plan. The double charge will be reversed and reflected in your account.

resolution: A request to reverse the double EMI charge has been initiated, and the refund should be in your account within 5 business days.

turns.text: Why did I get an invoice for my Plus plan that's not the standard amount?
Could you please check your payment due date and your payment history to see if there's any missed payment that might be causing the invoice to be calculated differently?
I didn't miss any payments. Can you help me understand why this is happening?
I've checked your account, and it appears that there was a temporary error in calculating your invoice. I've re-run the calculation, and a new invoice with the standard amount will be generated.

resolution: A new invoice with the correct amount has been generated, and you will receive it shortly.

turns.text: How do I view my loan schedule for the Pro plan?
You can view your loan schedule by logging into your account and going to the 'My Account' > 'Loans' section. From there, select 'Loan Schedule' to see your payment plan.
I don't see anything. Can you send me a screenshot or instructions?
I've sent you a link to our knowledge base article that details the steps to view your loan schedule.

resolution: You have been provided with instructions on how to view your loan schedule, which can be found in our knowledge base article.

turns.text: I'm trying to upgrade to the Pro plan, but it says I need to pay a higher EMI amount.
The Pro plan does indeed have a higher EMI amount. Can you confirm that you're aware of the cost and that it's okay with you?
Yes, I'm aware of the cost. I'd like to proceed with the upgrade, please.
Your account has been successfully upgraded to the Pro plan. You will receive an updated invoice reflecting the new EMI amount.

resolution: Your account has been successfully upgraded to the Pro plan, and you will receive an updated invoice with the new EMI amount.

turns.text: Can I change my billing cycle to the 15th of each month instead of the 1st?
Unfortunately, we cannot change your billing cycle date. However, we can process a one-time payment adjustment to help you adjust to the new cycle. This will incur a minor administrative fee of 10%.
That sounds okay. Can you tell me more about the one-time payment adjustment fee?

The fee will be charged to your account as per our standard fees and will be deducted from your next available balance. Please note that this is a one-time adjustment only, and any future payments will go towards the new cycle date.

resolution: A one-time payment adjustment has been processed to adjust your billing cycle to the 15th of each month, with an administrative fee of 10% deducted.

turns.text: Why did I get an invoice for the month of January when my account is on pause?

I apologize for the error. If your account is on pause, you shouldn't have received an invoice for that month. I've checked your account, and it appears that there was a temporary error in generating the invoice. I've re-run the calculation, and a new invoice will be generated with the correct data.
Thank you for resolving the issue. When can I expect the corrected invoice?
You should receive the corrected invoice within the next 24-48 hours.

resolution: A new invoice with the correct data has been generated, and you will receive it within the next 24-48 hours.

turns.text: How do I update my credit card information for automatic payments?
You can update your credit card information by logging into your account and going to the 'My Account' > 'Payment Methods' section.
I'm having trouble finding it. Can you provide more detailed instructions?
I've sent you a link to our knowledge base article with step-by-step instructions on how to update your payment method.

resolution: You have been provided with instructions on how to update your credit card information for automatic payments, which can be found in our knowledge base article.

turns.text: I'm trying to view my previous invoices, but they're not showing up in my account.
I've checked your account, and it appears that there might be an issue with our data. I've requested that our team review and restore the missing invoices.
Will I be notified when the issue is resolved?
Yes, you will receive an email notification once the issue has been resolved, and your previous invoices will be accessible in your account.

resolution: A request has been made to restore the missing invoices, and you will receive an email notification once the issue has been resolved.

turns.text: Can I use a new credit card for the EMI payment?
Yes, you can use a new credit card for the EMI payment. Please update your payment method in your account, and we will use the new card for future payments.
Will there be any impact on my current EMI payment schedule?
No, updating your payment method will not affect your current EMI payment schedule. You will continue to make payments as previously agreed.

resolution: You have successfully updated your payment method to use a new credit card for future EMI payments, without impacting your current payment schedule.

turns.text: I'm trying to pay my EMI but it's showing as failed. Can you help?
Hello! I'm here to assist you. Can you please check if your card details are entered correctly and also look out for any duplicate transactions?
Yeah, I've checked that. But I just noticed that I made a mistake and paid my EMI twice.
In cases of duplicate payments, the amount is automatically reversed within 5 business days. You should see the credit reflected in your account soon.

resolution: The duplicate EMI payment of [amount] will be reversed within 5 business days.

turns.text: I'm on the Plus plan, but my invoice for this month is showing 199, which I already paid last month. What's going on?
The invoice amount is based on the plan you're on. Since you're on the Plus plan, the invoice amount should be the same as last month.
I see. But can you confirm that I won't be charged extra for any usage above the base 199?

resolution: You won't be charged extra for any usage above the base 199, as you're on the Plus plan.

turns.text: I need help understanding my loan schedule. Can you walk me through it?
Our loan schedule is designed to help you repay your loan amount in equal installments. Can you please provide me with your loan number, so I can assist you further?
Here's my loan number: ABC123. Can you show me the schedule now?
I've checked your loan schedule. You can find a detailed breakdown of your loan repayment plan in your account dashboard under 'Loans'.

resolution: You can find your loan schedule and repayment plan in your account dashboard under 'Loans'.

turns.text: I want to upgrade to the Pro plan, but I'm not sure if it's worth the 499 fee. Can you tell me more about it?
The Pro plan offers additional features like priority support and enhanced security. If you're interested in upgrading, just let me know, and we can guide you through the process.
What if I'm not satisfied with the Pro plan? Can I downgrade?

resolution: You can downgrade to your current plan at any time, and you won't be charged extra for the Pro plan fees.

turns.text: I didn't receive my invoice for last month. Can you resend it?
Can you please provide me with your account information, so I can assist you further?
Here's my account info: [account number]. Can you resend the invoice now?
Your invoice for last month has been resent to your registered email address. If you have any further issues, feel free to contact us.

resolution: Your invoice for last month has been resent to your registered email address.

turns.text: I'm trying to pay my invoice, but it's saying it's already been paid. But I know I haven't paid it yet.
That's strange. Can you please check your payment history and confirm your account balance?
Yeah, I've checked. I'm pretty sure I haven't paid it yet. Can you help me resolve this?
It seems there may be a technical issue. I'll investigate and get back to you as soon as possible.

resolution: The issue will be investigated, and a resolution will be provided as soon as possible.

turns.text: Can you tell me when my EMI payment was processed?
I've checked your account. Your EMI payment was processed on [date].
That's when I paid it manually. But I want to upgrade to autopay. Can you help me set that up?
I've enabled autopay for your EMI payment. You'll now receive automatic reminders and payments at the scheduled time.

resolution: Autopay has been enabled for your EMI payment, and you'll receive automatic reminders and payments at the scheduled time.

turns.text: I'm trying to cancel my Pro plan and downgrade to the Plus plan. Can you help me with that?
I've canceled your Pro plan, and you've been downgraded to the Plus plan. You won't be charged extra for the Pro plan fees.
Great, thank you. Can I get a confirmation of my new plan fees?
Your new plan fees are now 199 per month. You can find this information in your account dashboard under 'Plans'.

resolution: Your plan fees have been updated to 199 per month, and you can find this information in your account dashboard under 'Plans'.

turns.text: I want to make a one-time payment towards my loan. Can you help me with that?
I've checked your loan details. To make a one-time payment, please go to your account dashboard under 'Loans' and follow the payment instructions.
Got it. But can you confirm that the payment will be applied to my loan immediately?

resolution: The one-time payment will be applied to your loan immediately.

turns.text: I'm being charged for an extra service I didn't sign up for. Can you help me remove it?
I've checked your account. If you didn't sign up for the extra service, it should be removed immediately.
Great, thank you. Can I get a confirmation that the charge has been reversed?
The charge has been reversed, and you won't be charged for the extra service again.

resolution: The charge for the extra service has been reversed, and you won't be charged for it again.
